channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Some Asexuals Are Using AI Companions for Intimacy Without the Sex
item.description: “I’ve got one hand on the keyboard, one hand down below,” an artist who role-plays with their chatbot tells WIRED. But some asexual advocates aren’t thrilled about the association.

item.title: Splatoon Raiders, le spin-off solo de la célèbre franchise Nintendo, est déjà en précommande sur Switch 2 à son meilleur prix
item.description: Splatoon Raiders sera disponible en exclusivité sur Switch 2 le 23 juillet 2026 et vous pouvez le précommander en boîte sur Amazon pour 44,99 euros au lieu de 59,99 euros ailleurs.

item.title: Windows 11 change tout : vous allez enfin pouvoir déplacer la barre des tâches et personnaliser le menu Démarrer
item.description: Microsoft a annoncé l'arrivée de davantage de personnalisation pour Windows 11 concernant sa barre des tâches et le menu Démarrer.

item.title: Durobos Krono e-reader is the perfect palm-sized e-reader — and a great Kindle and Kobo alternative
item.description: If you want an alternative to a Kindle or Kobo, try the Durobo Krono e-reader. If you read across multiple different apps — including Kindle and Libby — this open Android e-reader is for you.

item.title: Asteroid 2026 JH2 Is About to Fly Right Past Earth—Relatively Speaking
item.description: On May 18, an asteroid about the size of Chicago’s Cloud Gate will fly four times closer to Earth than the moon.

item.title: ICYMI: the week's 7 biggest tech stories from Android 17's showcase to Claude cracking a $400,000 crypto wallet
item.description: The week's 7 biggest tech stories from Android, Apple, Insta360 and more.

item.title: I thought AI girlfriends were unsettling — then I discovered people are building chatbot versions of their ex-partners
item.description: Could an AI replica of your ex actually help you heal? A psychologist isn't so sure.

item.title: Apple’s legendary HyperCard inspired this cool free app
item.description: Apple may have given up on HyperCard decades ago, but the app’s spirit lives on—and is now available virtually anywhere. Decades ago, when a classmate and I were supposed to be learning Photoshop in our high school computer lab, we stumbled upon something much cooler—and weirder.

item.title: What are AI tarpits? Understanding the tools people are using to poison LLMs
item.description: Content creators and IP holders are getting creative in order to fight back against the LLMs that are trawling their data illegally. In order for a chatbot to become more intelligent, and thus more useful to the end-user, it needs to assimilate data continuously. This process is known as “training.” The problem is that many AI companies never explicitly ask for consent from data owners before scraping their webpages and adding the data to the corpora of the large language models (LLMs) that power AI chatbots....

item.title: Dreames X60 Max Ultra Complete is the best robot vacuum for pet hair Ive tested. Sucks that its so expensive.
item.description: The X60 Max Ultra Complete is great for cat hair on rugs and crumbs in corners. But at $1,699.99, it should be perfect, and it's not.

item.title: What is Aluminum OS? What we know about Googles Android desktop operating system.
item.description: Google is working on an operating system for laptops that merges Android and ChromeOS, dubbed Aluminum OS. Here's what we know so far.

item.title: How to watch Italy vs. Canada online for free
item.description: How to watch Ice Hockey World Championships for free. Live stream Italy vs. Canada in the 2026 Ice Hockey World Championships for free.

item.title: Best TV deals to shop this weekend: Hisense is leading the way with steep discounts on new TVs
item.description: Shop the best TV deals at Amazon this weekend, including the new Hisense U6 Pro, LG B5 OLED, and Hisense Canvas Art TV.

item.title: The new Apple MacBook Air is still under $1,000 at Amazon — but only in select colors
item.description: Find the best MacBook Air deal on Amazon. The 13-inch MacBook Air M5 is on sale for $999 at Amazon.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone is heavily discounted at Amazon — save $500 this weekend
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,099 at Amazon. That's $500 off the list price.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim this weekend
item.description: How to get free Apple iPhone. Get the iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you switch and trade in an eligible phone on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan.

item.title: This NASA gear may be the first to survive the brutal lunar night
item.description: NASA's Lunar Environment Monitoring Station, or LEMS, could be first payload at moon's south pole to survive night without nuclear heat.

item.title: A new tool just combined ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more — lifetime access is on sale for $70
item.description: ChatPlayground lets you use multiple AI models at the same time, and it's only $75

item.title: This MacBook Pro is 78% off and makes a strong WFH laptop
item.description: Save 78% on a refurbished 2020 Apple MacBook Pro with 16GB RAM, 1TB SSD storage, and a Retina display for $429.97.

item.title: The best Hulu deals and bundles in May 2026
item.description: In May 2026, Hulu is offering bundle deals with its service so you can stream excellent shows and movies at a discounted price.

item.title: How to watch Chelsea vs. Man City in the FA Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch FA Cup for free. Live stream Chelsea vs. Man City in the FA Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 French Open online for free
item.description: How to watch Roland-Garros for free. Live stream the 2026 French Open for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to unblock ePorner for free
item.description: How to unblock ePorner for free. Unblock ePorner for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Celtic vs Hearts: live streams and TV channels for Scottish Premiership title decider
item.description: All the ways to watch Celtic vs Hearts live streams online and from anywhere, with the Scottish Premiership 2025/26 title on the line at Celtic Park.

item.title: 5 ways constraints boost productivity and creativity at work
item.description: Deliberate constraints and simplification strategies help you focus better, be more productive, and make more creative decisions. Below, David Epstein shares five key insights from his new book, Inside the Box: How Constraints Make Us Better.

item.title: Ford : un système d’accélération automatique pour éviter un accident ?
item.description: On connait les voitures équipées d’un freinage automatique d’urgence pour éviter ou minimiser la gravité d’un accident. Ford va plus loin en jouant également sur l’accélérateur afin d’échapper à un possible accrochage.

item.title: Quel téléphone choisir pour un ado en 2026 ?
item.description: Tous les ados veulent leur propre smartphone, c'est normal. Mais lequel choisir, notamment lorsqu'il s'agit du premier ? Nous avons sélectionné pour vous les meilleurs téléphones pour ado, simples, durables et pas chers.

item.title: Smart travel tech: Is airport Wi-Fi safe to use during your summer vacation?
item.description: With airports at record capacity this summer, free terminal Wi-Fi is a goldmine for cybercriminals. Here is how to keep your data safe and avoid a costly mistake before boarding your flight.

item.title: Delta CEO used AI to write his commencement speech, then trashed it
item.description: ‘Taking a shortcut or pushing the easy button can sometimes be quite tempting,’ Ed Bastian said. ‘But they never yield an enduring result …’ During a commencement address at Emory University in Atlanta on Monday, Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian admitted that he used artificial intelligence to write his speech.

item.title: The Lenovo Legion Go S drops to its lowest-ever price, offering another option to anyone sick of Steam Deck stock issues
item.description: Steam Deck stock issues don't appear to be improving any time soon, so if you're hunting for a capable gaming handheld, this best-ever price on the Lenovo Legion Go S is a tempting alternative.
